# FreeRTOS GCC Cortex-M7 r0p1 Port

This directory vendors the official FreeRTOS GCC Cortex-M7 r0p1 port used by
the hardware seed ELF target.

Source:

- `https://github.com/FreeRTOS/FreeRTOS-Kernel`
- tag: `V11.2.0`
- path: `portable/GCC/ARM_CM7/r0p1`

Files are kept unmodified unless a local compatibility patch is explicitly
documented.
